subject: refactor(structure): move cell controls above section controls
body:
Cell-level controls are more frequently used than section-level controls,
so placing them first reduces scrolling and matches the user's mental model
of editing the selected cell before its containing row/column.

Tags: structure, layout, ui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: layout-structure-controls
Semver: patch
